graphEvents.label: Optimize metric proof gate missing from audit output
Device/context low-power probes absent from audit hardening matrix
Hardening matrix lacks systematic fix-shape guidance
Polish readiness not enforced as audit gate

label: The requested harden/optimize/polish corpus files are nested under external/impeccable-main/site/content/skills, not at the corpus root.
evidence: rg --files external/impeccable-main listed site/content/skills/harden.md, optimize.md, polish.md
root-level nl reads returned no such file

label: Optimize metric proof is softened in design-audit report output
recommendation: Add Performance Evidence fields and a validator requiring metrics or explicit static-risk/not-assessed labels for high performance scores or readiness claims.

label: Low-power and reduced-capability device/context probes are absent from the current hardening matrix
recommendation: Add a Device And Constrained Context section with low-power, data-saver, CPU-throttled, offline-to-online, and slow-network media probes.

label: Hardening matrix captures symptoms but not systematic recommended fix-shapes
recommendation: Add a Fix shape to recommend column or companion reference while preserving audit reports as routing-only, not implementing fixes.

label: Polish readiness is not enforced before P3-only polish outcomes
recommendation: Add a Polish Readiness field and defer P3 polish findings when functional blockers, unresolved TODOs, or missing completion evidence are present.

label: Design-audit must keep the audit-never-fixes boundary while improving fix-shape guidance.

direction: Convert design-audit into an implementation skill for harden/optimize/polish fixes
reason: The current audit packet explicitly reports and routes accepted fixes without applying them; the buildable change is stronger report/fix-shape guidance, not mutation authority.
